SQLLite.SQL: INSERT INTO DCS D (D.ITEM_DATE, D.REPORT_ID, D.TRANSACTION, D.INOUT, D.FINAL, D.USER_ID, D.ADMIN_COURT_CODE) VALUES (TRUNC(Sysdate), ${param.reportId}, 0, 'D', 'Y', ${param.userId}, ${param.courtId})

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin admin cpSuper
